role: Flutter-specific requirements, model generation from OpenAPI, contract consumption

openapi_model_generation.description: Auto-generate Dart models and API clients from OpenAPI spec

tools.openapi_generator_dart_dio: Industry standard — generates Dart API clients, models, serialization from OpenAPI 3.x
tools.swagger_parser: Dart-native OpenAPI parser, generates Retrofit-based clients with better Dart idioms
tools.Freezed_json_serializable: Gold standard for immutable Dart models with JSON serialization, copyWith, equality, union types
tools.build_runner: Dart code generation engine powering Freezed, json_serializable, Retrofit

openapi_model_generation.method: API-first design — OpenAPI spec is single source of truth, models never hand-written

contract_validation.description: Validate API contract compatibility between Flutter and FastAPI

tools.openapi_diff: Detect breaking changes between spec versions
tools.Spectral: Lint OpenAPI spec for naming conventions, required fields, error formats

feature_requirement_mapping.description: Map TRD requirements to Flutter-specific feature modules
feature_requirement_mapping.method: Feature-first architecture — each feature maps to self-contained module (data/domain/presentation)

ui_component_cataloging.description: Define UI component requirements as living catalog

tools.Widgetbook: Storybook-equivalent for Flutter — living UI component catalog with hot reload
